citations.row: Discount rate for domestic and international plans on September 30, 2019

financial_answer.brief_explanation: The difference between the domestic discount rate of 4.00% and the international discount rate of 1.90% as at September 30, 2019 is calculated by subtracting the international rate from the domestic rate.
